overrides.text: Authentication / users / authorization are out of scope
overrides.justification: next-auth is a pre-existing dependency in the template (package.json) that was not added by this implementation. The POST /api/notes endpoint does not use or import any authentication functionality - it is completely unauthenticated as required by the spec. The route.ts file only imports from next/server and the in-memory notes-store, with no auth-related imports or logic.

overrides.text: persistence MUST be the in-memory store, not a database
overrides.justification: @prisma/client is a pre-existing dependency in the template (package.json) that was not added by this implementation. The POST /api/notes endpoint uses only the in-memory notes-store from ../../../lib/notes-store.ts and does not import or use @prisma/client or any database functionality. All persistence is handled by the in-memory store as required by the spec.
